channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Cordial Trump-Xi meeting is a 'good sign,' says longtime U.S. diplomat
item.description: Longtime U.S. diplomat Richard Haass interprets President Trump's meeting with China leader, Xi Jinping. He said though the two have different priorities the cordial summit could be a 'good sign.'
item.content:encoded:
Longtime U.S. diplomat Richard Haass interprets President Trump's meeting with China leader, Xi Jinping. He said though the two have different priorities the cordial summit could be a 'good sign.'

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: President Trump's first day in China
item.description: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jingping {shee-jihn-ping} during his first day in the country. A look at what happened at the high-stakes summit.
item.content:encoded: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jingping {shee-jihn-ping} during his first day in the country. A look at what happened at the high-stakes summit.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: The New Yorker's Evan Osnos shares his thoughts on the Trump-Xi summit
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep talks with the New Yorker's Evan Osnos about his impressions of the Trump-Xi summit.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Steve Inskeep talks with the New Yorker's Evan Osnos about his impressions of the Trump-Xi summit.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: Israel and Lebanon meet in D.C. again for peace talks
item.description: Representatives for Israel and Lebanon meet in Washington, D.C., for a second time to end the war, as their ceasefire frays.
item.content:encoded: Representatives for Israel and Lebanon meet in Washington, D.C., for a second time to end the war, as their ceasefire frays.
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: How Asia is reacting to Trump's summit in China
item.description: President Trump is in Beijing for his big summit with Chinese leaders. How Asia is reacting to the summit.
item.content:encoded: President Trump is in Beijing for his big summit with Chinese leaders. How Asia is reacting to the summit.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Pak

item.title: Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera dream together again at Met Opera
item.description: Gabriela Lena Frank's first opera, in its Met debut, sees late Mexican painter Frida Kahlo leaving the underworld on the Day of the Dead to be reunited with her husband and fellow artist Diego Rivera.
item.content:encoded:
El Último Sueño de Frida y Diego at New York's Metropolitan Opera.'/>

Gabriela Lena Frank's first opera, in its Met debut, sees late Mexican painter Frida Kahlo leaving the underworld on the Day of the Dead to be reunited with her husband and fellow artist Diego Rivera.

(Image credit: Marty Sohl)
item.dc:creator: Jeff Lunden

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jingping for summit during first day in the country, what Asia thinks of Trump's visit, appeals court hears arguments from law firms targeted by Trump.
item.content:encoded: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jingping for summit during first day in the country, what Asia thinks of Trump's visit, appeals court hears arguments from law firms targeted by Trump.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: Trump's DEI blitz raises questions: Could the NFL's Rooney Rule be flagged next?
item.description: The Trump administration is challenging DEI policies at firms that seek diverse candidates through the hiring process. Could the NFL be next?
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration is challenging DEI policies at firms that seek diverse candidates through the hiring process. Could the NFL be next?
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: These women are trying to change Chinese smoking culture
item.description: Cigarette smoking is ingrained in Chinese culture. NPR's Steve Inskeep talks to a couple of women trying to change that.
item.content:encoded: Cigarette smoking is ingrained in Chinese culture. NPR's Steve Inskeep talks to a couple of women trying to change that.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: Sports fans seek out podcasts for coverage of their favorite teams
item.description: Legacy sports news outlets are drying up as fans flock to "sports therapy" video streams and podcasts.
item.content:encoded: Legacy sports news outlets are drying up as fans flock to "sports therapy" video streams and podcasts.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kenney
